name: InspectAgents AI Testing Tools
description: Search 500+ AI failure incidents, assess AI deployment risk, get the 63-point testing checklist, and submit feedback. The most comprehensive AI agent safety resource.

tools.name: search_failures
tools.description: Search and filter the AI failures database (500+ incidents) by category, severity, year, or free text

tools.name: get_failure
tools.description: Get full details of a single AI failure by ID

tools.name: assess_risk
tools.description: Run the AI risk assessment quiz and get personalized recommendations

tools.name: get_checklist
tools.description: Retrieve the 63-point AI Agent Risk Checklist, optionally filtered

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Submit feedback, corrections, or new AI incident reports

resources.description: Complete failures database as JSON (500+ incidents)
MCP Apps-compatible HTML overview for agent UI surfaces
